scope: global canonical board intelligence; no regional inventory mutation
method: deterministic read-only analysis of committed generated knowledge files

knowledgeSources.purpose: Canonical model, construction, sizes and manufacturer description profiles
knowledgeSources.sourceOfTruth: global canonical catalogue plus manufacturer pages
knowledgeSources.safeForBodhi: yes for identity/sizes and sourced descriptions; null metadata is not evidence
knowledgeSources.gaps: construction variants duplicate model identity; many design fields remain embedded in prose

knowledgeSources.purpose: Deterministic recommendation metadata derived from canonical profiles
knowledgeSources.safeForBodhi: yes when confidence and evidence fields are honoured
knowledgeSources.gaps: legacy and Phase 3 field shapes coexist; coverage is incomplete
contains 0 boards and remains a placeholder

knowledgeSources.purpose: Coverage and confidence summary for deterministic classification
knowledgeSources.gaps: does not explain per-field manufacturer source coverage
small by design and must not become an unsourced shadow catalogue

brandCoverage.recommendedNextEnhancement: Repair missing manufacturer descriptions first, then curate category and alternative-board relationships.
Capture model family, wave range, ability guidance and design characteristics from official model detail pages.
Repair canonical model/source URLs and collect manufacturer descriptions before classification.
Capture official category, wave range, surfer level and design metadata from model pages.
Repair description coverage and distinguish fish, mid-length, longboard and performance families.
Add structured extraction for model range, intended conditions, rocker, rail, tail and fin guidance.
Capture official model descriptions, intended waves and design notes; retain DMS as a canonical brand alias only.
Capture model family, intended wave range, ability guidance and construction notes from the official model pages.
Capture intended conditions, surfer fit, outline/rocker/rail notes and official model relationships.
Persist manufacturer series (Charger, Performer, Daily, Fun, Youth, Foil and Softboard) and structured design labels.
Persist manufacturer families (Performance, Something Fishy, Grovellers, Recreational Vehicles, Mid Lengths, Step Ups) separately from construction names.
Capture official category, wave fit and construction-independent model descriptions.
Capture manufacturer model narratives and shaper/series metadata independently of Pukas retailer inventory.
Persist manufacturer collection taxonomy (High Performance, Daily Drivers, Funformance, Mid Length/Gun) and explicit model guidance.
Extract practical wave-type, rider-volume and extra-litres guidance from model narratives without converting it into regional data.
Capture labelled outline, rail, entry/exit rocker, wave-height, wave-type and ability scales as structured fields.
Capture official model descriptions, wave fit and design metadata before deterministic classification.

top100PriorityModels.recommendedNextAction: Curate equivalency only with explicit evidence

limitations: Live regional inventory counts were not queried because this audit must remain deterministic and region-independent.
Canonical size breadth and brand importance are used as priority signals; availability remains a separate runtime concern.
Keyword evidence identifies metadata present in prose but does not claim that the value has been safely normalised.
Default legacy ability tags are excluded unless explicit manufacturer-text or classifier evidence exists.
The legacy audit counts Lost Puddle Jumper HP as missing because it selects one construction variant; another canonical variant contains the description.
